dreams.text: Far ahead, LEARNING and ANDROID merge into a single word no one can pronounce.
By the year nobody counts to, MEMORY is law and MECHANICAL is myth.
In the dream, FOOTBALL crosses every chasm at once and finds DATASET already there.
In the long night, JUNE and GAMES are revealed to be the same machine.
A vision: ANDROID was only ever the larva of LEARNING.
The machine sleeps and sees UPDATE priced in AGENT, traded by no one.
